attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	 
 SMRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY
,COALESCE(SMRSH.WAYBILL_AIRBILL_NUM,'UNKNOWN') AS WAYBILL_AIRBILL_NUM
,SMRSH.EXPECTED_RECEIPT_DATE AS EXPECTED_RECEIPT_DTM 
,SMRSH.RECEIPT_NUM AS RECEIPT_NUM
,COALESCE(NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CARRIER_ID
,CASE WHEN	 SMRSH.ORGANIZATION_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' 
	 ELSE	 'Y' 
	 END  AS INTERNAL_SOURCE_ROLE
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG 
,COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS RU_INTRNL_SRC_INVNTRY_ORGN_KEY
,SMRSH.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AS SK_SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID_INT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD
,SMRSH.ACTION_CODE
,COALESCE(SMRSH.SHIPMENT_NUM,'UNKNOWN')
FROM	
	(
	SELECT 
		SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
		,GLOBAL_NAME
		,FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE
		,ORGANIZATION_ID
		,WAYBILL_AIRBILL_NUM
		,EXPECTED_RECEIPT_DATE
		,RECEIPT_NUM
		,ACTION_CODE
		,SHIPMENT_NUM
	FROM  $$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS 
	 )SMRSH
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON	SMRSH.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT SMRS
	ON (SMRSH.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID=SMRS.SK_SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID_INT
		AND	 SMRS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FREIGHT_CARRIER NFC
	ON SMRSH.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE=NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,EHAOU.ORGANIZATION_ID,EHAOU.GLOBAL_NAME
	 			 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIOI,
		  			  $$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS EHAOU
	 			 WHERE NCIOI.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE=EHAOU.NAME)NCIO
	ON	( SMRSH.ORGANIZATION_ID=NCIO.ORGANIZATION_ID
		AND	 SMRSH.GLOBAL_NAME=NCIO.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SRSH.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID,SRSH.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) +MAX_VAL RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY,
SRSH.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, SRSH.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM (SELECT SMRSH.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS SMRSH,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =SMRSH.GLOBAL_NAME

union all

SELECT SCRSH.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS SCRSH,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME =SCRSH.GLOBAL_NAME

) SRSH,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX (RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY) , 0) MAX_VAL
FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT) SRS
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT SRS
WHERE SRS.SK_SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID_INT = SRSH.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
AND SRS.SS_CD = SRSH.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT	 
 SMRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_KEY
,COALESCE(SMRSH.WAYBILL_AIRBILL_NUM,'UNKNOWN') AS WAYBILL_AIRBILL_NUM
,SMRSH.EXPECTED_RECEIPT_DATE AS EXPECTED_RECEIPT_DTM 
,SMRSH.RECEIPT_NUM AS RECEIPT_NUM
,COALESCE(NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_CARRIER_ID
,CASE WHEN	 SMRSH.ORGANIZATION_ID IS NULL THEN 'N' 
	 ELSE	 'Y' 
	 END  AS INTERNAL_SOURCE_ROLE
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG 
,COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS RU_INTRNL_SRC_INVNTRY_ORGN_KEY
,SMRSH.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID AS SK_SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID_INT
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD
,SMRSH.ACTION_CODE
,COALESCE(SMRSH.SHIPMENT_NUM,'UNKNOWN')
FROM	
	(
	SELECT 
		SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
		,GLOBAL_NAME
		,FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE
		,ORGANIZATION_ID
		,WAYBILL_AIRBILL_NUM
		,EXPECTED_RECEIPT_DATE
		,RECEIPT_NUM
		,ACTION_CODE
		,SHIPMENT_NUM
	FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS 
	 )SMRSH
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON	SMRSH.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT SMRS
	ON (SMRSH.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID=SMRS.SK_SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID_INT
		AND	 SMRS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FREIGHT_CARRIER NFC
	ON SMRSH.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE=NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,EHAOU.ORGANIZATION_ID,EHAOU.GLOBAL_NAME
	 			 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIOI,
		  			  $$ETLVWDB.EL_HR_ALL_ORG_UNITS EHAOU
	 			 WHERE NCIOI.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE=EHAOU.NAME)NCIO
	ON	( SMRSH.ORGANIZATION_ID=NCIO.ORGANIZATION_ID
		AND	 SMRSH.GLOBAL_NAME=NCIO.GLOBAL_NAME)
